title: tragacantha filicaulis
intro: Tragacantha filicaulis, also known as the common hair sedge or carex, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha filicaulis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
